title: Contact or home address of another claimant
pageHeader: Contact or home address of [Full name of another claimant]
pageText: We'll send any correspondence to this address.

additionalClaimantAddress1.required: Enter the first line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 100 characters
additionalClaimantAddress1.invalid: Enter the first line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 100 characters

additionalClaimantAddress2.required: Enter the second line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddress2.invalid: Enter the second line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressTown.required: Enter a town or city for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddressTown.invalid: Enter a town or city for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressCountry.required: Enter a country for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddressCountry.invalid: Enter a country for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressPostcode.required: Enter a postcode. For example, SW1 1AA
additionalClaimantAddressPostcode.invalid: Enter a valid postcode. For example, SW1 1AA
